title: Add 2-column reading layout, file uploads, and fullscreen mode

requirements.text: Implement a 2-column layout for Reading tests where the passage is displayed on the left panel and questions are displayed on the right panel

quotes: On Reading, passage is on the left and questions are on the right panel

acceptanceCriteria: Reading test interface displays passage in left column
Reading test interface displays questions in right column
Layout is responsive and maintains readability
Both panels are scrollable independently if content overflows

requirements.text: Add file upload capability for Writing tests to allow images and audio files to be included in test questions

quotes: In writing and listening add an option to include files like images, audios

acceptanceCriteria: Writing test creation form includes file upload option
Supports image file formats (PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF)
Supports audio file formats (MP3, WAV, OGG)
Uploaded files are stored and associated with specific questions
Uploaded files display correctly during test taking

requirements.text: Add file upload capability for Listening tests to allow images and audio files to be included in test questions

quotes: In writing and listening add an option to include files like images, audios

acceptanceCriteria: Listening test creation form includes file upload option
Supports image file formats (PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF)
Supports audio file formats (MP3, WAV, OGG)
Uploaded files are stored and associated with specific questions
Uploaded files display correctly during test taking

requirements.text: Implement fullscreen mode that automatically activates when a test is started

quotes: When the test is started, the interface goes fullscreen

acceptanceCriteria: Test interface enters fullscreen mode automatically upon test start
Fullscreen mode covers entire screen without browser chrome
Fullscreen request handles user permission appropriately

requirements.text: Add an exit fullscreen button that allows users to leave fullscreen mode during tests

quotes: there also an options to exit full screen

acceptanceCriteria: Exit fullscreen button is visible and accessible during test
Clicking exit button successfully exits fullscreen mode
Test continues normally after exiting fullscreen
Button has clear visual indication of its purpose

constraints: Maintain existing authentication system with hardcoded credentials
Preserve existing test types (Reading, Writing, Listening)
Keep existing scoring and IELTS band calculation logic intact
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: Adding new test types beyond Reading, Writing, and Listening
Adding collaborative features or multi-user test taking
